title: UART bridge on the XiaoS3 WIO

messages.author: Augeas
messages.text: How tenable would it be to get one of these boards listening on the UART (to be prodded by a MicroPython client on Hacker Camp badge) and BLE? Just a matter of messing with the build flags here? https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/blob/bfd4800f5985049be1cbb8785d129e7680b89771/variants/xiao_s3_wio/platformio.ini
